messages.author: Primpie
messages.text: Starting a thread for Central Michigan. I’m in Coleman, and will be building out the area with several solar repeaters in the next month or so (waiting for warmer weather). I’m really hoping to find other folks in the surrounding area to work with - the dream would be to connect Coleman, Clare, and Sanford - covering the US10 corridor. No doubt, this will need to be a community effort. I believe Meshcore can serve as a community resilience resource, and we should seek grant opportunities to help build and sustain these projects.
messages.content_html: Starting a thread for Central Michigan. I’m in Coleman, and will be building out the area with several solar repeaters in the next month or so (waiting for warmer weather). I’m really hoping to find other folks in the surrounding area to work with - the dream would be to connect Coleman, Clare, and Sanford - covering the US10 corridor. No doubt, this will need to be a community effort. I believe Meshcore can serve as a community resilience resource, and we should seek grant opportunities to help build and sustain these projects.

messages.author: Dan - WI7FI [PNW]
messages.text: if there's other michiganders out there you should help with this. I would if I hadn't moved to the west coast!
messages.content_html: if there's other michiganders out there you should help with this. I would if I hadn't moved to the west coast!
messages.reactions_html: 1

messages.author: Primpie
messages.text: A little outside of my scope, but I was able to get another solar node (Seeed P1 Pro) on a great tower today - 230’ up with a 10dBi Rokland. Just outside of Shepherd. It connects to Coleman decently, but might suffer weather and seasonal foliage changes. Hope folks start getting inspired and add to the network. Reach out if you’re not sure how to help.
messages.content_html: A little outside of my scope, but I was able to get another solar node (Seeed P1 Pro) on a great tower today - 230’ up with a 10dBi Rokland. Just outside of Shepherd. messages.author: Nerobergstr
messages.text: Building out in Lake Orion area. Hoping someday I’ll get 20 hops to Coleman network.
messages.content_html: Building out in Lake Orion area. Hoping someday I’ll get 20 hops to Coleman network.

messages.author: Chris KI4WCO
messages.text: I just got my WisMesh Tag today. I have parts ordered to make a Solar Repeater. I am located on the edge of Midland and Bay County off Waldo. My repeater will probably be about 30' up..

messages.author: Uncle Lit
messages.text: the meshcore dev team have moved to a new discord server. details and reasons are here: https://blog.meshcore.io/2026/04/23/the-split Please create a new thread for your region in the https://discord.com/channels/1495203904898728149/1495412453150818585 for your region on the new meshcore.io discord server. https://meshcore.gg
